title: Fix Services page card layout alignment and remove inconsistent gaps

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, fix the service card grid layout so that all 15 service category cards align to the top of their grid cells. Use CSS grid with `items-start` (align-items: start) on the grid container so no card is pushed down relative to its row neighbors. Remove any fixed height or min-height set on individual service cards and allow each card to size dynamically based on its content.

quotes: Set all service cards to align at the top using vertical alignment: top.
Remove any fixed height from service cards. Use dynamic height based on content.
Some cards start lower than others.

acceptanceCriteria: All 15 service cards start from the same top edge within their grid row.
No card has a fixed height or min-height CSS property applied.
Cards with fewer sub-service items are not stretched to match taller neighbors.
Cards with more sub-service items expand naturally without overflow or clipping.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, replace the existing card grid container with a clean responsive CSS grid using Tailwind classes: `grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6` (or equivalent). Ensure equal column widths, consistent row gap, and consistent column gap across all breakpoints. Remove any irregular margin or padding on individual cards that causes uneven spacing between cards.

quotes: Use a clean responsive grid layout with: Equal column width, Consistent row spacing, Consistent column spacing
Remove extra margin or padding causing uneven gaps.
Uneven gaps make the layout look unprofessional.

acceptanceCriteria: All columns have equal width at each breakpoint.
The gap between all adjacent cards (both horizontal and vertical) is identical.
No individual card has extra margin-top, margin-bottom, or padding overrides that differ from siblings.
Grid renders as 1 column on mobile (< 640px), 2 columns on tablet (640px–1023px), and 3 columns on desktop (≥ 1024px).

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, apply uniform internal padding to every service card using a consistent Tailwind padding class (e.g., `p-6`) applied identically to all cards. Ensure the padding on top, bottom, left, and right is equal for all cards. Remove any per-card padding overrides that differ between cards.

quotes: Apply consistent internal padding for all cards: Top padding: equal, Bottom padding: equal, Left and right padding: equal
Content alignment inside cards is inconsistent.

acceptanceCriteria: Every service card uses the same padding value on all four sides.
No individual card has a different padding class or inline style overriding the shared padding.
Card content does not touch the card border on any side.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, enforce uniform vertical spacing between the internal elements of every service card in a consistent order: icon → title → description → sub-service list. Use consistent Tailwind spacing utilities (e.g., `mb-3` or `space-y-3`) applied identically across all 15 cards so the gap between each element pair is the same on every card.

quotes: Maintain uniform spacing between: Icon, Title, Description, Service list
Content alignment inside cards is inconsistent.

acceptanceCriteria: The gap between the icon and the card title is identical on all 15 cards.
The gap between the title and the description is identical on all 15 cards.
The gap between the description and the sub-service list is identical on all 15 cards.
Sub-service list items have consistent spacing between them on all cards.

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx, verify that the fixed layout, consistent padding, and top-aligned grid display correctly across desktop (≥ 1024px), tablet (640px–1023px), and mobile (< 640px) screen sizes. Ensure no card overflows, overlaps, or misaligns on any breakpoint. Maintain all existing dark navy (#0a1628) background, golden yellow (#f5c518) accent colors, card border/shadow styles, icons, and branding — only layout and spacing must change.

quotes: Ensure professional alignment across all screen sizes: Desktop, Tablet, Mobile
Maintain existing design, colors, and branding.
Optimize layout to look clean, compact, and professional like top compliance websites (IndiaFilings, LegalKart style).

acceptanceCriteria: On desktop (≥ 1024px): 3-column grid with all cards top-aligned and evenly spaced.
On tablet (640px–1023px): 2-column grid with all cards top-aligned and evenly spaced.
On mobile (< 640px): 1-column stack with uniform card padding and no horizontal overflow.
All existing card colors, icons, typography, border radius, and shadow styles are unchanged.
No card content is truncated or hidden due to the layout changes.

constraints: Do not change the content (sub-service lists, icons, titles, descriptions) of any service card.
Do not alter the existing dark navy (#0a1628) background or golden yellow (#f5c518) accent colors.
Do not modify any file outside of frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx for this fix.
Do not add 'show more' or collapse behavior — all sub-service items must remain fully visible.
nonGoals: Adding new service cards or changing service content.
Modifying the FreeConsultationSection or hero section on the Services page.
Changes to Navigation, Footer, or any other page component.
Changing fonts, color tokens, or the global CSS theme.
